name: Mock Mashed Potatoes (or Millet Cauliflower Puree)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan or pot, add the millet and stir in an additional 1/4 cup of water.
2. Roast on medium-high until the millet starts to brown or turn aromatic, stirring continuously.
3. Before it becomes burnt, add the remaining water, salt, and cauliflower (torn into small pieces).
4. Bring to a boil, cover, and simmer for 45 minutes.
5. When done, mash if desired.
